title: IIOS Policy Decision
description: The deterministic output of the Policy Engine for one action-request. Reproducible from evidence plus policy_version alone.

policy_version.description: Version of the policy bundle evaluated, independent of kernel_checksum.

kernel_checksum.description: SHA-256 (canonical, LF-normalized) of governance/invariant-kernel/invariants.json at evaluation time.

replayed.description: True when this decision was served from the idempotency cache rather than freshly evaluated.

reason_codes.description: Request-level reason codes, e.g. when overall_decision differs from a simple aggregation (budget_exceeded, governance_degraded).

explanation.description: Human-readable rationale for operator display. Never authoritative; reason_codes and matched_rules are.

fail_closed.description: True when this decision was forced to deny/require_approval because a dependency (Kernel, policy store, budget service, audit sink) was unavailable.

reasonCode.description: Machine-readable, e.g. INVARIANT_MATCH, CLASS_D_PROHIBITED, APPROVAL_REQUIRED, BUDGET_EXCEEDED, GOVERNANCE_UNAVAILABLE, KILL_SWITCH_ACTIVE, POLICY_VERSION_MISMATCH, CAPABILITY_EXPIRED, CAPABILITY_REPLAY_DENIED, DUPLICATE_REQUEST, SELF_APPROVAL_FORBIDDEN, SECRET_VALUE_DISCLOSURE_FORBIDDEN, SECRET_REFERENCE_APPROVAL_REQUIRED.
